narrative_role: Atto III, continuazione del WOW 3. La bussola dimostra di essere VIVA.

prompt_components.subject: the now-glowing orange compass held in an open weathered palm, viewed from above
prompt_components.action: the orange needle rotates in deliberate motion — not the frantic spin of a broken compass, but a thoughtful searching movement; it pauses, rotates again slightly, then settles on a direction; in the soft background, slightly out of focus, two other figures lean in from the edges of frame in slow motion
prompt_components.environment: macro top-down on hand and compass, white sand softly blurred behind, warm light suffused
prompt_components.camera_movement: very slow gradual zoom out, revealing slightly more of the surrounding context
prompt_components.lighting: the compass continues to emit its inner orange glow, casting warm light on the palm and faintly on the figures leaning in
prompt_components.mood: magical, contemplative, the dawning of understanding
prompt_components.audio_hint: sustained warm low resonance, soft crystalline overtones, very faint whispered breath from the surrounding figures (no words), no music yet (music enters in 09)

_critical_note: Estensione narrativa di 08A. L'arancione deve essere coerente con la scena precedente (#FF6B1A saturated).
acceptance_criteria: L'ago si muove in modo deliberato, non casuale
Il glow arancione è continuo, non pulsante
Le figure ai bordi visibili ma indistinte
Audio: resonance che continua, nessuna musica
